activities_projects.title: Identify Major Physiographic Divisions
activities_projects.objective: Understand the major physical divisions of India
steps: Read the section on major physiographic divisions
List the six physical divisions of India
Write one key feature for each division
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Students identify the main physical divisions of India

activities_projects.title: Draw the Himalayan Ranges
activities_projects.objective: Learn about the divisions of the Himalayas
steps: Draw three horizontal lines representing the Himalayan ranges
Label them as Himadri, Himachal, and Shiwaliks
Write one feature of each range
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Students understand the structure of the Himalayan mountain system

activities_projects.title: Map Identification Activity
activities_projects.objective: Locate physical features on the map
steps: Mark the Himalayas on the northern border
Mark the Northern Plains and the Peninsular Plateau
Label them clearly
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Students learn to identify physical features on maps

activities_projects.title: Northern Plains Features List
activities_projects.objective: Understand the characteristics of the Northern Plains
steps: Read the section about the Northern Plains
List three rivers that form the Northern Plains
Write two reasons why the plains are fertile
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Students understand the importance of the Northern Plains

activities_projects.title: Plateau Characteristics Activity
steps: Write the two main divisions of the Peninsular Plateau
List two hill ranges found in the plateau
Mention one mineral found in this region
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Students understand the features of the Peninsular Plateau

activities_projects.title: Indian Desert Description
activities_projects.objective: Understand the climate and features of the Indian Desert
steps: Write the location of the Indian Desert
Mention two features of desert climate
Name one river flowing in the desert region
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Students learn about desert landforms and climate

activities_projects.title: Coastal Plains Identification
activities_projects.objective: Learn about the western and eastern coastal plains
steps: Write the names of the western coastal divisions
Write the names of the eastern coastal divisions
Mention one important lake found on the eastern coast
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Students understand coastal regions of India

activities_projects.title: Island Groups Chart
activities_projects.objective: Understand the island groups of India
steps: Write the names of the two island groups of India
Draw small diagrams of each island group
Write one feature of each group
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Students identify and differentiate island groups of India

activities_projects.title: Important Peaks List
steps: List five important Himalayan peaks
Write their height or location if available
Underline the highest peak
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Students become familiar with major Himalayan peaks

activities_projects.title: Short Paragraph on Physical Diversity
activities_projects.objective: Understand the diversity of India's landforms
steps: Think about different landforms in India
Write a short paragraph explaining their importance
Include mountains, plains, plateaus, deserts, coasts, and islands
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Students understand the diversity of India's physical features
activities_projects.evaluation: Clarity and relevance of paragraph (10 marks)
